movie.actors: Jaden Smith, Will Smith, Sophie Okonedo, Zoë Kravitz
movie.plot: A crash landing leaves Kitai Raige and his father Cypher stranded on Earth, a millennium after events forced humanity's escape. With Cypher injured, Kitai must embark on a perilous journey to signal for help.
movie.title: After Earth
movie.writer: Gary Whitta (screenplay), M. Night Shyamalan (screenplay), Will Smith (story)
